code:
import io
import string

fn read_target() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let target = read_target()
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)

  mut count = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if token == target
        count = count + 1
      end
      token = ""
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if string.len(token) > 0
    if token == target
      count = count + 1
    end
  end

  print("count=#{count}")
end
